title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Caramel Children, Big Mom, Unknown person #11, Charlotte Linlin as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It isn't easy playing that Mother Act, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orphan seller Mother Carmel Underworld Name: Mountain Witch

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I should start winding my activities down. Time to wash my hands of this business.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ufufu! What song shall we sing today?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, that's a pirate song, silly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yep! And we'll be pirates one day, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nope, I'll just sell off every last one of you to the govern- ment!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: OH? Is that so? How cool!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We piled up a bunch of your favorite Semlas to make this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I wonder if it turned out alright?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You call it a croquem- Bouche?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Eat as much as you want!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Eat as much as you want, Linlin!

dialogue.text: that was on the day of the

dialogue.speaker: Charlotte Linlin
dialogue.text: And the kind and generous mother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She was sur- rounded by everyone's smiles.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as she ate her beloved, sweet birthday care

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a wonderful day this was! She could barely see through the tears.

dialogue.speaker: Caramel Children
dialogue.text: What a wonderful birthday today was!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HAAH...(7) I was so focused on eating

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that I chopped down on the table a few times.:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
